original: amber-tinted honey scent, by the faint whiff you catch. Azra seems rather enamored by it, her nostrils flaring excitedly.
... sweet... sweet... whatever it is, it smells like honey and sex mixed together in a pot. Your blood burns from the delightful scent.
bites, punching through a thin spot in your [pc.upperGarment]
bites the exposed skin near your shoulder

. You yell as you feel his venom pumping into your bloodstream. Ceasing your struggle momentarily, your thoughts become hazy and your movements sluggish; suddenly the idea of surrendering to this powerful male’s coils doesn’t sound like such a bad idea....
You’re too doped up to care anymore. You give in.
Azra is to intoxicated to fight back.
Fortunately, your airtight equipment saves you from its inebriating effects. Haha!
You gasp in alarm, inadvertently drinking deeply of the tainted air. It’s overwhelming. Tremendous lust surges through you
, though you somehow shake it off before you find yourself kneeling before these chimeric aggressors.
, reaching into your crotch and stirring the pot of your lust until it threatens to boil over. You drop to your knees in desperation, resistance forgotten. All you can think about is getting off.
